revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | revision.comment: Bot: add category Category:Chinese imperial eras
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.comment: Bot: append Wikidata-derived interwikis
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_yue" to "zh-yue"
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | revision.comment: Merge [[Category:台湾の元号]] into [[Category:Era Names of Taiwan]] via bot
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. revision.comment: Merge [[Category:清の元号]] into [[Category:Qing dynasty era names]] via bot
revision.text:
'''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | redirects to 紀元}} || {{ill|2nd Year|ja|2年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2nd Year|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} || {{ill|3rd revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|qq=|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh min nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|qq=|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|qq=|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|qq=|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh_min_nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh_yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, [[:en:Manchu language|Manchu language]]: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the [[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Kyanryū Emperor]] of the [[:en:Qing dynasty|Qing]]. It spans from [[:en:1736|1736]] to [[:en:1795|1795]]. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''[[:en:Qianlong Emperor|Qianlong Emperor]]'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh_classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st revision.text:
[[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q1077532]] Wikidata name: Qianlong Era [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:54, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|ltq=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|ltq=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language|1=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing|1=Qing dynasty}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language|1=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing|1=Qing dynasty}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] [[fr:Ère Qianlong]][[ja:乾隆]][[ko:건륭 (청)]][[uk:Цяньлун]][[zh-classical:乾隆]][[zh-min-nan:Khiân-liông]][[zh-yue:乾隆]][[zh:乾隆]] '''Kenryū''' (乾隆, {{ill|Manchu language|en|Manchu language|WD=Q33638|lt=Manchu language|1=Manchu language}}: {{mongol|ᠠᠪᡴᠠᡳ
ᠸᡝᡥᡳᠶᡝᡥᡝ|lt=abkai wehiyehe}}) is an era name used during the reign of the {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Kyanryū Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}} of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|WD=Q8733|lt=Qing|1=Qing dynasty}}. It spans from {{ill|1736|en|1736|WD=Q6989|lt=1736|1=1736}} to {{ill|1795|en|1795|WD=Q7815|lt=1795|1=1795}}. Because of the "One reign, one era system" ({{ill|One reign, one era system|ja|一世一元の制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One reign, one era system|1=one reign, one era name|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q700890}}), the emperor is referred to as '''{{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|WD=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}}'''. In Chinese history, this era name was used for 60 years, making it the second-longest used after {{ill|Kangxi|ja|康熙|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi|1=Kangxi Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1185178}}. {{ウィキプロジェクトリンク|紀年法}} == Comparison with the AD Calendar == {| class="wikitable" style="background-color:#ffffff;text-align:center" |- style="background-color:#cccccc;font-weight:bold" | {{ill|Kenryū|ja|乾隆|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenryū|1=Qianlong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1077532}} || {{ill|1st
